Interface IDatabaseSequence

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that request database sequences.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("BE61A3AE-26C6-4302-B226-93E33219D46C")]
public interface IDatabaseSequence

Properties

Sequences

The sequences in the database.

IEnumSequence Sequences { get; }

Property Value

IEnumSequence

sequenceName string
StartValue int
IncrementValue int

sequenceName string

Sample Snippet

GetSequenceInfo(string, out int, out int, out int)

Get the current value and increment value in a sequence.

void GetSequenceInfo(string sequenceName, out int CurrentValue, out int IncrementValue, out int StartValue)

Parameters

sequenceName string
CurrentValue int
IncrementValue int
StartValue int

Sample Snippet

Get the next value in a sequence.
